name: MSI Radeon RX 5500 XT MECH 8GB OC Video Graphics Card – Used
description: MSI Radeon RX 5500 XT MECH 8GB OC Video Graphics Card – Used What is MSI Radeon RX 5500 XT MECH 8GB OC Video Graphics Card – Used price in Pakistan? MSI Radeon RX 5500 XT MECH 8GB OC Video Graphics Card – Used price in Pakistan is Rs.40,000. It comes with 1408 stream processors and boost clock up to 1845 MHz paired with 8GB GDDR6 memory on a 128-bit bus for reliable 1080p gaming. Based on PCIe 4.0 interface, it supports 4 displays and 4K resolution with dual cooling fan design.
